vibe: Authoritative, Punchy, Raw, Energetic. Like a strict but highly effective mentor.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl md:text-7xl font-black tracking-tighter uppercase leading-none
hierarchy.h2: text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-black tracking-tight uppercase leading-none
hierarchy.overline: text-xs md:text-sm font-bold tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-accent_primary

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Intentional asymmetry, heavy borders, strictly no rounded corners, stark contrast. Negative space is your weapon.
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Tetris Grid. Use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12. Allow elements to span multiple columns asymmetrically.

surface_strategies.cards: border-4 border-black bg-white shadow-[8px_8px_0_0_rgba(0,0,0,1)] rounded-none transition-transform hover:-translate-y-1 hover:-translate-x-1 hover:shadow-[12px_12px_0_0_rgba(0,0,0,1)]
surface_strategies.buttons: border-4 border-black bg-accent_primary text-white font-black text-xl uppercase rounded-none shadow-[6px_6px_0_0_rgba(0,0,0,1)] hover:-translate-y-1 hover:-translate-x-1 hover:shadow-[10px_10px_0_0_rgba(0,0,0,1)] px-10 py-5
surface_strategies.secondary_buttons: border-4 border-black bg-accent_secondary text-black font-black text-xl uppercase rounded-none shadow-[6px_6px_0_0_rgba(0,0,0,1)] hover:-translate-y-1 hover:-translate-x-1 hover:shadow-[10px_10px_0_0_rgba(0,0,0,1)] px-10 py-5
surface_strategies.inputs: border-4 border-black bg-white rounded-none p-4 text-lg focus:ring-0 focus:outline-none focus:border-accent_primary focus:shadow-[6px_6px_0_0_#FF331F]

hero.layout: Grid split: Left side massive text, right side abstract code image or a massive HTML-based brutalist 'FAIL/PASS' stamp graphic.
hero.headline: STOP APPLYING BLINDLY. KNOW IF YOU'RE JOB-READY.
hero.subtext: Project banaya, par confidence nahi? Get your frontend code reviewed by brutal experts and get a real job-readiness score in 48 hours.

pain_points.layout: Bento box of 3 stark black cards with white text.
pain_points.content: Focus on rejection, ghosting, and tutorial hell.

solution.layout: Massive scrolling marquee text in background 'SKILL PROOF PASSPORT', foreground showing 4 harsh steps in a tight grid.

sample_report.layout: HTML-built UI component resembling a printed receipt or grading rubric. High use of JetBrains Mono.
sample_report.visual: A massive, purely CSS-built stamp graphic scoring '68/100' or 'NEEDS WORK'.

pricing.layout: 3 columns. Middle column (₹299) has yellow background (accent_secondary), pushed slightly up. Heavy black borders everywhere.

form_embed.layout: Embedded iframe wrapped in a window-like container (macOS retro window style) with heavy borders.

success_page.layout: Minimalist centered block. Massive green button 'GET RESULT ON WHATSAPP'. WhatsApp Number: 8260345793.

images.description: Abstract computer code screen to use as texture or right-side hero visual.
Indian student coding on laptop, suitable for pain points or about section.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Brutalist offset shadows expand on hover. Translate elements up and left.
motion_and_interaction.scroll_animations: Harsh snap reveals. No soft fading. Elements pop in instantly.
motion_and_interaction.marquee: Slow, constant movement for 'SKILL PROOF PASSPORT' separator using purely CSS or react-fast-marquee.

components_mapping.cards: Custom HTML/Tailwind divs with strict borders.
components_mapping.icons: Lucide React, rendered with stroke-width 3 for harshness.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Outfit for headings, IBM Plex Sans for body text, and JetBrains Mono for the report card data. Import via Google Fonts.
Do not use Shadcn default cards. Implement the neo-brutalist shadow classes provided in surface_strategies.
Ensure the sample report card is built using HTML/CSS (use JetBrains Mono font) to look like a harsh technical grading sheet. Do not use an image for the report card.
Integrate the WhatsApp link (https://wa.me/918260345793) on the success page with a massive neon green button.
Embed the Google form inside a bordered container that looks like a retro terminal window.
Never use soft shadows, gradients, or rounded corners > sm.
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, links, and forms for automation testing.
